physiotherapist.name: Dr. Krisha Patel
physiotherapist.tagline: Restoring Your Movement, Enhancing Your Life
physiotherapist.about: My mission is to provide high-quality, evidence-based physiotherapy that empowers patients to take control of their health. With a specialization in Orthopedic manual therapy and over 5 years of clinical experience in Ahmedabad, I believe in a holistic approach that doesn't just treat symptoms, but addresses the root cause of dysfunction.
physiotherapist.philosophy: I believe every patient is unique. My treatment philosophy combines advanced manual therapy techniques with modern rehabilitation technology and personalized exercise medicine to ensure long-term recovery and performance optimization.

services.title: Orthopedic Physiotherapy
services.subtitle: Bone & Joint Care
services.description: Expert management of fractures, osteoarthritis, and joint replacements using manual mobilization and strengthening.

services.title: Sports Injury Rehab
services.subtitle: Performance Recovery
services.description: Comprehensive return-to-play protocols for ACL tears, ligament sprains, and muscle strains for professional athletes.

services.title: Neurological Rehab
services.subtitle: Nerve & Brain Recovery
services.description: Specialized care for Post-Stroke recovery, Parkinson's, and Spinal Cord injuries to improve balance and coordination.

services.title: Pediatric Therapy
services.subtitle: Child Developmental Care
services.description: Gentle, play-based physical therapy to help children reach their developmental milestones and improve motor skills.

services.title: Vestibular Rehab
services.subtitle: Dizziness & Balance
services.description: Evidence-based maneuvers and exercises to treat Vertigo (BPPV) and chronic dizziness issues.

services.title: Women's Health
services.subtitle: Maternal & Pelvic Care
services.description: Pre and post-natal care, pelvic floor rehabilitation, and management of osteoporosis in women.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Mehta
testimonials.text: Dr. Aryan's treatment for my sports injury was excellent. I was back on the field sooner than expected. Highly professional!

testimonials.name: Sita Patel
testimonials.text: The post-surgery rehab I received was life-changing. The personalized care and attention to detail are what set this clinic apart.

testimonials.name: Amit Shah
testimonials.text: Highly recommended for chronic back pain. The posture correction tips were very helpful and the exercises are easy to follow.

whyChooseMe.title: Personalized Treatment
whyChooseMe.description: Every patient receives a unique care plan tailored specifically to their condition and goals.

whyChooseMe.title: Modern Techniques
whyChooseMe.description: We utilize the latest evidence-based physiotherapy methods and equipment for faster recovery.

whyChooseMe.title: Goal-Oriented
whyChooseMe.description: Our focus is not just on reducing pain, but on returning you to your peak physical performance.
